programme.title: Live: United Football League
programme.desc: The Birmingham Stallions host the Orlando Storm for a UFL Week 4 match at Protective Stadium. This game is a pivotal clash between the undefeated expansion team and the multi-year champions. Orlando sits at the top of the standings with a 3-0 record.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

programme.desc: Live and breaking news for New York City and the surrounding area.

programme.title: 99 to Beat
programme.desc: The remaining contestants compete in five games including Upturned Cups, Spring Head, Sleeping Bag Race, Traffic Cone Flip and Arc the Ball.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: The Sunday Mass
programme.desc: Sunday religious service.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Author and evangelist Joel Osteen spreads his message of love and hope as he preaches at the 30,000-plus member Lakewood Church in Houston. The program can be seen in more than 100 countries. Osteen urges people to live at their full potential and form a close relationship with God.

programme.title: Amazing Facts
programme.desc: Bible study proclaims God's good news to the world.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Explaining the political prophecy of cancel culture.

programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.desc: Pastor Steven Furtick of Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C. shows what God can accomplish.

programme.title: FOX News Sunday
programme.desc: Energy Secretary Chris Wright; Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.); Sen. Rick Scott (R-Fla.); former Kentucky Attorney General Daniel Cameron; panel discussion with Francesca Chambers, Sarah Isgur, Reince Priebus and Kevin Walling.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Ellipse Fit by LegXercise-FREE Deluxe Offer for First 300 Callers!
programme.desc: Do you spend too many hours sitting at a desk? Do you have a tough time exercising due to joint pain? Ellipse Fit will strengthen your legs, boost mobility, and improve circulation with low impact leg movement. Order NOW & claim your FREE Bonus!

programme.title: Raw Travel
programme.desc: Rob embarks on an urban exploration of the charming and musically diverse city of Kingston, Jamaica.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR RaceDay
programme.desc: NASCAR fans get the very latest on the day's big race with this preview show featuring up-to-the-minute analysis, driver interviews, predictions and more. Host Shannon Spake is joined by analysts Chris Myers, Adam Alexander, Kaitlyn Vincie, and others.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The NASCAR Cup Series heads to Kansas Speedway for a 400-mile race. This marks the ninth event of the season. Drivers complete 267 laps around the 1.5-mile intermediate asphalt track. Ty Gibbs looks to build momentum following a win at Bristol.

programme.title: Live: IndyCar Racing
programme.desc: The IndyCar Series runs the Grand Prix of Long Beach in California. This event serves as the fifth round of the season. Drivers navigate 90 laps around a challenging 1.97-mile street circuit encircling the Long Beach Convention Center.

programme.title: Krapopolis
programme.desc: Deliria can't get her family to sit still for just one nice picture.

programme.title: Universal Basic Guys
programme.desc: The Hoagies go down the shore; Tammy tries to make amends with her estranged sister.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: The Smiths throw a pool party attended by Francine's sister and Steve's ex when a dead rat is found in the pool.
